title: How to use integration Columns
excerpt:
Hi everybody, 
I was able to use the Graph API to create an Integration column and to populate with some data, but now I want to populate with a Hyperlink. How can I do that?

posts.author: christian.rodas (Christian Rodas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everybody,
I was able to use the Graph API to create an Integration column and to populate with some data, but now I want to populate with a Hyperlink. How can I do that?


image936×76 6.07 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @christian.rodas

Last time I checked the reply from monday was “don’t use that column, it experimental”. Don’t know if anything changed yet but did not see any communication about this column. You can write only once to that column and I don’t believe you can send a link to it.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @christian.rodas!

Yes agreed-- at this time, it’s better to utilize a Text column and make sure to tell your users to select mapping for it. This way, you will receive the values.

Happy to submit this as feedback.
